plan:
```builder
Order
  .parallelize(
    verify_customer("cu_392"),                                          // fraud check
    check_inventory([{sku: "A", qty: 2}, {sku: "B", qty: 1}]),        // stock check
    calculate_shipping("123 Main St", [{sku: "A", qty: 2}, {sku: "B", qty: 1}]),  // shipping cost (needed for charge amount)
    validate_payment("pm_abc")                                          // payment method check
  )
  .if(all four results pass — verify_customer.ok, check_inventory.ok, validate_payment.ok, calculate_shipping succeeds):
    sequence(
      charge_card("pm_abc", calculate_shipping.cost),                  // charge using shipping-inclusive amount
      create_order("ord_5521", "cu_392")                               // create record only after successful charge
    )
  .else:
    sequence(
      hold_order(
        "ord_5521",
        // Collect all failure reasons for a descriptive hold message
        reason: [
          !verify_customer.ok     ? `Fraud check failed (score: ${verify_customer.fraud_score})` : null,
          !check_inventory.ok     ? `Inventory missing: ${check_inventory.missing}` : null,
          !validate_payment.ok    ? "Payment method invalid" : null,
          calculate_shipping.error ? "Shipping calculation failed" : null
        ].filter(Boolean).join("; ")
      ),
      email_admin(
        "admin@example.com",
        message: `Order ord_5521 for customer cu_392 has been placed on HOLD.\nReasons: ${hold_order.reason}\nPlease review and take action.`
      )
    )
```
